creator: mur1080224@inter7.jp
text:
- Fix the wrong configure option for NLS support that should be specified
  in building:
    (NG) --(enable|disable)-nls
    (OK) --(with|without)-gettext
- Delete unnecessary library link for NLS support
  ("-lintl" is added by the configure script executed even if it is
  not specified here.)

Fix: Patch attached with submission should be imported.


Patch attached with submission follows:
